description: Backend Developer yang berfokus pada microservices, core banking

hero.title: Backend / Golang Developer
hero.p1: Hai saya seorang Backend Developer dengan total 2,5 tahun pengalaman dalam membuat service yang stabil dengan menggunakan Golang terutama untuk sistem core banking dan fintech.
hero.p2: Saya terbiasa membuat service secara microservices, gRPC, dan belajar hal baru. Saya fokus pada pembuatan API Arsitektur, database, dan monitoring.

item_2.name: Image Resizer Converter
item_2.description: This Go program allows you to resize images and convert them to WebP and AVIF formats. It leverages the ImageMagick library for image manipulation.

item_3.name: Ranata Studio
item_3.description: Web Apps Booking Design Interior & Exterior using wordpress custom php.

item_1.description: Developed high-performance microservices (gRPC, GraphQL, REST) for Bank Jabar Banten Syariah and PT POS Indonesia using Go and Python

item_2.description: Shipped real-time sync, keyboard-first interactions, and performance optimizations.

item_3.description: Designed payment flows and merchant dashboards. Led the migration to React 18 and improved CI/CD pipelines.
